habitat: Temperate and boreal Europe and Asia.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional leaf tea as a mild diuretic for flushing the urinary tract.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditioneller Blättertee als mildes Diuretikum zur Durchspülung der Harnwege.
activeCompounds: Flavonoids, saponins, essential oil traces, vitamin C
preparation: Dried leaf infusion; birch water (sap) as seasonal beverage in north Europe.
cautions: Adequate fluid intake when using diuretic teas. Seek care for UTI symptoms.
historicalNotes: Central tree in northern European culture and folk medicine.
habitatDe: Gemäßigt und boreal Europa und Asien.
activeCompoundsDe: Flavonoids, saponins, ätherisches Öl traces, vitamin C
preparationDe: Getrocknet Blatt Aufguss; birch water (sap) as seasonal beverage in north Europa.
cautionsDe: Adequate fluid intake when using diuretic teas. Seek care für UTI symptoms.
historicalNotesDe: Central tree in northern Europaan culture und folk medicine.
